_comment: Curated Ollama (GGUF) model picks shown in the LEco DevOps dashboard 'Popular models' dropdown and by `leco-cli.sh ollama popular`. Edit freely — names must match Ollama registry IDs. Sizes are approximate disk footprint at the default quantization.

models.name: llama3.2:1b
models.label: Llama 3.2 · 1B (Q4)
models.description: Smallest Meta Llama 3.2 instruct — great for smoke tests, low-RAM laptops.

models.name: llama3.2:3b
models.label: Llama 3.2 · 3B (Q4)
models.description: Balanced general-purpose model; fast on CPU.

models.name: qwen2.5:0.5b
models.label: Qwen 2.5 · 0.5B (Q4)
models.description: Tiny Qwen 2.5 instruct; useful for tests + low-end devices.

models.name: qwen2.5-coder:7b
models.label: Qwen 2.5 Coder · 7B (Q4)
models.description: Code-focused Qwen 2.5 — completion, refactor, code review.

models.name: deepseek-r1:1.5b
models.label: DeepSeek R1 · 1.5B (Q4)
models.description: Smallest distilled DeepSeek R1 reasoning model.

models.name: deepseek-r1:7b
models.label: DeepSeek R1 · 7B (Q4)
models.description: Medium DeepSeek R1 distilled; better reasoning than Llama at 7B.

models.name: phi3:3.8b
models.label: Phi-3 Mini · 3.8B (Q4)
models.description: Microsoft Phi-3 Mini instruct; efficient quality/size tradeoff.

models.name: nomic-embed-text
models.label: Nomic Embed Text (embeddings)
models.description: Open-source text embedding model — use for RAG / vector stores.
